events.title: Bistro Open Fri-Sun/Clam Bar Fri & Sat
Blahut Communion Dinner
events.description:
Approx. 30
West Dining Room
Adults & Kids
Sit Down

Menu: 
3 Passed Appetizers: Caprese Skewers, Bacon Wrapped Scallops, Chicken Skewers

Salad (tbd), 

Adults: Choice of:
Grilled NY Strip Steak with oyster mushrooms & balsamic demi-glace, herb roasted potatoes, seasonal vegetable
Fish (choice of one – Grilled Salmon or Seared Tuna), appropriate accompaniments
“Petro Pasta” Penne with oil, garlic sun-dried tomatoes, wilted spinach

Children: Choice of:
Pasta with butter or marinara
Chicken tenders & fries
Children’s burger & fries

Cake (provided by client) –$2 per person plating fee should serving staff cut & serve cake. 

Includes soft drinks, coffee, tea (espresso & cappuccino available at menu price)

Running a tab for the bar. Servers to take orders and deliver drinks. 
Gratuity to be added to bar tab.

events.title: Trivia on Tap in Beach Club
Bridal Shower (approx 40 guests)
events.description:
Bridal Shower Luncheon in Beach Club

Menu:  $25 per person, plus tax & 22% gratuity.

ChampagneToast

1st Course = HouseSalad

2nd Course = GuestChoose: Chef Signature "Petro Pasta" OR Freshly Roasted TurkeyBreast Sandwich w/ Pickles & Fries OR Chicken Napoli Sandwich w/ Pickles& Fries

3rd Course = Cake tobe provided by client and staff to slice & serve

 

Include Drinks: Nonalcoholicbeverages provided. 

Bar Tab to be run andclosed at end of event. 22% gratuity to be added to tab.

Rich Defeo Solo Acoustic Guitar Inside
Jaclyn & Michael Rehearsal Dinner
events.description:
Number of Guests ~ 34 adults & 3 children under12

 

Menu

Appetizer: Cheese & Fruit Platter (one for each table)

Bread & Butter


Salad: Arugula & Pear Salad with Candied Walnuts, Dijon Mustard Dressing


Entree selections:

Slow Roasted Top Sirloin of Beef    or

Housemade Crab Cakes (seasonal slaw as garnish)   or

Panko Topped Herb Roasted Chicken Breast

Chicken Tenders & Fries for children

 

All served with Roasted Red Bliss Potatoes & Asparagus

 

Dessert: Client bringing cupcakes

 

Meal pricing to include non-alcoholic beverages (sodas, iced tea, lemonade, coffee/tea)

events.title: Daddy O x Jetty Summer Launch Party
events.description:
Join us to celebrate the launch of our limited-edition 2026 t-shirt collab in The Garden at Daddy O, celebrating our 20th summer!

A ticket includes a complimentary beverage and a raffle ticket for your chance to win a beach cruiser bike and other great prizes. $1 of every ticket is being donated to the Jetty Rock Foundation.

Come kick off the summer with Jetty & Daddy O, as we begin our 20th year in LBI!
